categories.label: Authentication
categories.description: JWT verification, login, and user-credential handling. Auth defects are exam-critical.

categories.label: Transaction processing
categories.description: Ledger writes, balance reads, transaction validation and history — the money path.

categories.label: PII handling
categories.description: Account holders, contacts, and personal data persistence subject to privacy controls.

categories.label: Audit logging
categories.description: Request/response tracing and ledger-read streaming that form the audit trail.
